title: SoheilPKO Multi-EMA Setup
thesis_bullets: You're going to learn perfect EMA settings and then a very accurate trading strategy that makes consistent profit.
All right, we need to add five exponential moving averages with some special settings and combination.
Here we click on indicators and we search ribbon.
This indicator gives you four moving averages and then later I will add another EMA.
We need to change the settings of these moving averages.
So here we go to the settings of the ribbon and first we change the type of moving averages to EMA because as I said we need exponential moving averages.
Then here for the first EMA we set the length at five.
For the second EMA we also set the length at five.
And for the first EMA here for the source of calculation we set it to high.
And for the second EMA it should be based on low.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when Moving Average Ribbon (EMA setup) bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on 1h bar close.
Use longer MACD side of zero as trend direction gate before entries.
Trigger entries when shorter MACD aligns with longer MACD direction.
Gate entries when Moving Average Ribbon (EMA setup) stays above control threshold to avoid weak-pressure chop.
Derived idea: use ATR-based stop/TP envelope for deterministic testability of swing-style stops.
